name: Above-ground spa install
description: Standard above-ground portable spa: slab, power, position, handover. Prices are ex GST and are YOUR defaults - edit them in Settings > Price templates.

lineItems.details: Supply, pour and finish Hi Strength 32 MPA concrete with fine sand and 20mm aggregate for strength bonding in an 80-100 slump mix.

lineItems.notes: Half-day mobile crane incl. traffic control if street lift

lineItems.description: Electrical cable run from switchboard (trenched or clipped)

lineItems.details:
Supply and installation of a wired electrical circuit protected in conduit in accordance with AS/NZS 3000 wiring rules to provide power for the spa.

Supply and installation of circuit protection devices using a miniature circuit breaker to protect against the risk of a short circuit.

Supply and installation of a weatherproof industrial switch in order to isolate the circuit if necessary or in case of an emergency.
lineItems.notes: Licensed electrician, certificate of compliance supplied

lineItems.description: Tight access allowance - manual handling / spa trolley
Fill, commission, water balance and handover walkthrough
